figures.caption: Table 5. The eight reasoning personas, each mapped to a Schoenfeld episode (Schoenfeld, 1985).
Figure 1. Latent trait alignment over response progress. Softmax-normalised mean similarity s̄k(t) of four persona traits as a function of normalised response position.

Figure 2. Example generation with and without steering using DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B and the arbiter persona vector. Steering towards the arbiter persona at §4 makes the reasoning stop after committing to a solution.
Figure 3. Paragraph label distribution over response progress. Fraction of paragraphs assigned each persona label at each normalised progress bin.
